overall.description: A first-person perspective bus driving simulation in heavy rain, starting from an airport terminal bus stop where passengers board, then proceeding onto a multi-lane highway, through a tunnel, and continuing in rainy conditions. The footage is rendered in a game engine (BeamNG.drive) with realistic rain effects, windshield wipers, and vehicle physics.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop at airport terminal

events.description: passengers begin boarding the bus through the front door
bus doors close and vehicle begins to depart from the terminal stop

agents.ego_description: operating the bus controls while passengers board, then releasing the parking brake and departing the terminal stop

notable_agents.action: elderly woman entering the bus and walking toward the rear seating area
man in red tank top boarding while holding a transit ticket

entered.detail: glass and metal shelter structure with digital route displays and bench seating
modern glass facade of Berlin Tegel airport terminal with large windows
yellow and white ticket validation machine mounted near the bus entrance

segments.scene_description: The bus is stationary at a covered airport terminal bus stop during heavy rain. Passengers board through the front door while the driver waits. The modern glass airport terminal building is visible to the right. At around 12 seconds, the doors close and the bus begins to accelerate away from the stop.

events.description: exits the covered bus stop area and enters open highway exposed to heavy rain
accelerates to highway speed while merging into the main traffic flow

agents.ego_description: accelerating along the departure ramp and merging into the main highway flow while windshield wipers maintain visibility

notable_agents.action: blue vehicle with flashing lights visible in the distance, moving in the same direction

entered.detail: concrete bridge structure spanning across the highway ahead
tall gray concrete wall lining the right edge of the highway
text overlay showing Line TXL Airport Berlin Tegel to Alexanderplatz

segments.scene_description: The bus accelerates away from the terminal, transitioning from the sheltered stop to the open highway exposed to heavy rain. Concrete noise barriers appear along the right side as the vehicle merges onto the main road. The route information for Line TXL appears on screen as the bus gains speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with concrete barriers and tree lines

events.description: following a white sedan at safe distance in heavy rain conditions
rain intensity increases further reducing forward visibility

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed in the right lane, following traffic through heavy rainfall with wipers at high speed

notable_agents.action: white sedan directly ahead with brake lights intermittently visible through the rain
silver car overtaking in the left lane with headlights on

entered.detail: metal framework structure supporting highway direction signs spanning across lanes
dense green trees visible beyond the noise barriers on the left side

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along an elevated highway section flanked by concrete noise barriers on both sides. Trees line the left side beyond the barriers. The bus follows a white sedan through increasingly heavy rain, with other vehicles visible in the left lane. Overhead sign gantries appear in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway tunnel with artificial lighting and ventilation systems

events.description: enters tunnel transitioning from natural overcast light to artificial tunnel lighting
navigating through moderate traffic density inside the tunnel

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through the tunnel, adjusting to artificial lighting and enclosed space

notable_agents.action: pink sedan in the left lane maintaining parallel position with the bus
white car ahead with bright headlights illuminating the tunnel interior

entered.detail: curved concrete ceiling with ventilation ducts and evenly spaced lighting fixtures
gray concrete walls with red and white reflective safety striping
illuminated green emergency exit signage and metal door

segments.scene_description: The bus enters a highway tunnel, transitioning from the rainy exterior to the artificially lit enclosed space. The concrete walls feature red and white safety markings, and emergency exit signs are visible. The bus shares the tunnel with moderate traffic, including a pink sedan in the left lane and a white car ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway exit ramp with guardrails and vegetation

events.description: exits tunnel back into overcast rainy conditions with natural lighting
approaching highway exit ramp with directional signage visible

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and continuing along the highway exit ramp, adjusting to the return of rainy conditions

notable_agents.action: orange car taking the right exit ramp ahead of the bus

entered.detail: metal safety barriers with reflective markers along the left road edge
highway exit direction signs indicating upcoming off-ramp
dense tree line along the grassy highway embankment

segments.scene_description: The bus exits the tunnel back into the heavy rain and overcast conditions. The scene opens to a highway exit ramp with metal guardrails on the left and dense trees on the right embankment. An orange car is visible taking the exit ramp ahead as the bus continues along the main highway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a bus departs from a sheltered airport terminal and merges into the heavy rain of an open highway. It begins stationary at a covered bus stop, where passengers board through the front door against the backdrop of a modern glass terminal building. As the doors close, the bus accelerates away from the shelter, transitioning from the protected stop into a downpour of heavy rain. The scene then shifts as the vehicle gains speed and merges onto the main road, with concrete noise barriers appearing along the right side. Finally, the route information for Line TXL manifests on screen as the bus fully integrates into the flow of highway traffic.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy highway that transitions through a sheltered tunnel before returning to an open, overcast landscape. It begins on an elevated section of road flanked by concrete noise barriers and trees, following a white sedan through increasingly heavy rain under distant overhead sign gantries. As the bus moves forward, the scene shifts from the rainy exterior into the artificially lit enclosure of a highway tunnel, where red and white safety markings line the concrete walls. The camera then emerges from the tunnel back into the heavy rain and gray skies, as the environment opens up to reveal a highway exit ramp with metal guardrails and dense embankments. Finally, the view settles on the main highway as an orange car peels off toward the exit, leaving the bus to continue its journey through the storm.
